compiled_state.author: Iso Tester
compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. Author a .rebar/workflows/X.yaml with an `agent` step that uses read_file/search_files.
2. Run it via `rebar run-workflow` / MCP `run_workflow`.

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: the agent reads a pinned-SHA snapshot (the raze-vet-ditch process).
- Actual: rebar.workflow.runs.run() builds RunnerAgentStep(repo_root=...) with NO config and NO gate_read_root, so LLMConfig.from_env falls through to the server's mutable working tree (current_code_root unset). No ref/source param exists on run_workflow. It is also gated only by REBAR_MCP_READONLY, not REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM — so a billable tool-using agent runs outside the LLM gate.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] run_workflow agent steps with file tools read a snapshot (attested) or are explicitly fail-closed when no ref/source is provided; never the mutable checkout silently.
- [ ] run_workflow accepts/propagates ref/source (or sets the gate code root for the run).
- [ ] run_workflow's live-agent path is fenced by REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM.
- [ ] A test reproduces the wrong-tree read and asserts the fix (snapshot or fail-closed).
compiled_state.title: run_workflow agent steps bypass repo-snapshot isolation (read the mutable checkout)
